title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM SIX, ab. MARINDUQUE, SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5160 / 52 OG No. 7, 3531 (July, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1463, June 14, 1956 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM SIX, ab. MARINDUQUE, SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item Six, ab. Marinduque, section three o Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven, is hereby amended to read as follows:

"6. Lamesa Barrio School, Mogpog芒聙聰

Construction芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄.. P5,000.00

"6-a. Mogpog Central School芒聙聰

Repair and improvement芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄. 5,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.
